pages.text: 今天Sam爸爸带咘咘来儿童乐园！好多好多游乐设备——滑梯、秋千、跷跷板！
pages.text_en: Today Sam Daddy takes Bubu to the playground! So many things to play with — slides, swings, and seesaws!

pages.text: 咘咘最想玩秋千！NOMI帮咘咘坐上去，轻轻推～荡起来啦！
pages.text_en: Bubu wants to ride the swing the most! NOMI helps Bubu sit on it and gives a gentle push — wheee, she's swinging!

pages.text: 咘咘越荡越开心，风吹着耳朵好舒服呀～
pages.text_en: Bubu swings higher and higher, so happy! The breeze tickles her ears — it feels wonderful!

pages.text: 突然，旁边的豆豆不小心碰了一下秋千，咘咘没抓稳——扑通！摔下来了！
pages.text_en: Suddenly, Doudou the hedgehog accidentally bumps the swing — Bubu loses her grip and tumbles off!

pages.text: 咘咘坐在地上，膝盖有点疼，眼泪在眼眶里打转……好沮丧呀。
pages.text_en: Bubu sits on the ground. Her knee hurts a little, and tears well up in her eyes… She feels so frustrated.

pages.text: NOMI蹲下来，轻轻拍拍咘咘：「摔倒没关系，每个人都会摔跤的。」
pages.text_en: NOMI kneels down and gently pats Bubu: "It's okay to fall down. Everyone falls sometimes."

pages.text: NONO飞过来叽叽喳喳：「我学飞的时候摔了好多好多次呢！」
pages.text_en: NONO flies over, chirping cheerfully: "When I was learning to fly, I fell so many times!"

pages.text: 豆豆跑过来道歉：「对不起，我不是故意的……」咘咘擦擦眼泪：「没关系！」
pages.text_en: Doudou runs over to apologize: "I'm sorry, I didn't mean to…" Bubu wipes her tears: "It's okay!"

pages.text: 咘咘深吸一口气，自己爬起来，重新坐上秋千！
pages.text_en: Bubu takes a deep breath, gets up all by herself, and climbs back onto the swing!

pages.text: 这次咘咘抓得紧紧的，越荡越高，越荡越高！风在耳边呼呼响！
pages.text_en: This time Bubu holds on tight, swinging higher and higher! The wind whooshes past her ears!

pages.text: 咘咘笑着大喊：「摔倒没关系，再来一次！」🌟 NOMI和Sam爸爸在下面鼓掌！
pages.text_en: Bubu shouts with a big smile: "It's okay to fall — just try again!" 🌟 NOMI and Sam Daddy cheer and clap below!
